raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "To Semini arridsan ne
buhs ta pahrdoht/ ka to ne warre-
tu atkat atpirkt/jo taSemine pre-
derr man/un juhs effat Sweſchi-
neekt un Peedſihwotaji pee man.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz buhs juhs wiſſa
juhsfu thpaſcha Seminē Waltu
doht/to Semini atkat iſpirkt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad taws Brahlis is-
gintſi / un pahrdoht fo labbu no
fawa Jhpaſcha / tad buhs win-
na Tuwakani winnam par Js-
pirzeju nahkt / un to iſpirkt / fo
winna Brahlis pahrdewis irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ja kurrain Iſpirzeja ne
irr / bet winna paſcha Rohka tik
daunds eespehj / un winnam irr/
zik par winna Iſpirſchanu wai-
jaga irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad buhs winnam tohs
Gaddus lihdsinaht / kad winſch
to pahrdewis irr / un to / kas
pahri irr tam Wihran atdoht /
kam winſch to bij pahrdewis/ un
pee fawa Jhpaſchuma atgreeſtees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ja winna Rohkā ne
irr / zik gan irr winnam atdoht/
tad buhs tas / fo winſch pahrde-
wis irr/ ta Birzeja Rohkā lihds
Gawileschanas Gaddam / bet
Gawileschanas Gaddā buhs tam
iſeet/ un winnam buhs pee fawa
Jhpaſchuma atgreeſtees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad kas weenu Mah-
jas-Weetu pahrdoht kahdā muh-
retā Pilsfahtā/ tam buhs Wat-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ja tas ne tohp is-
virks/ kanehr wiſs tas Gads
apkahrt / tad buhs tam Nam-
man/ kas ta Pilsfahta irr/kam
Muhriſ irr / tam Pirzejam us
mahſcam palikt winna pehz-
nahkameem / tam ne buhs Ga-
wileſchanas-Gaddā iſeet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tohs Namunus/ kas
Laukā irr / buhs lihds ka tohs
Semnes Tihrunus lihdsinaht /
teem buhs iſpirkteem tapt / un
Gawileſchanas-Gaddā iſeet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet kas ta Lewitu Pils-
fahtem peenahkahs / un winnu
ihpaſchu Pilsfahtu Namneem /
teem Lewiteem buhs weena muh-
ſchiga Iſpirſchana buht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad kas fo labbu no
teem Lewiteem atpirk/ tad buhs
ta Pahrdoſchana winna ihpa-
scha Namma/jeb Pilsfahta Ga-
wileſchanas-Gaddā pagallam/ jo
tee Nammi eekſch Lewitu Pils-
fahtem irr winnu Jhpaſchums
starp Israēta Behrneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tam Tihrumam/kaſ
preekſch winnu Pilsfahta / ne-
buhs pahrdohtam tapt/ jo tas ir-
preekſch winneem weens muh-
ſchigs Jhpaſchums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ja taws Brahlis is-
gintſi/ un fawn Rohkn prett teu-
isſteepj/ tad buhs tew winnu us-
xemt / itt ka Sweſkhineeku un-
Peedſihwotaju/ ka tas pee teu-
dihwo.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
